reviewSummary: Both workflows match specification. scrape-user-data.yml correctly uses config.json with jq parsing, runs chuumai-tools Docker containers with proper VERSION env vars, mounts outputs/ volume, and runs import_user_data.py via uv. refresh-songs.yml correctly runs weekly cron + workflow_dispatch, conditionally fetches songs.json from wonderhoy API when maimai is in config, and auto-commits.

nonBlockingIssues.description: refresh-songs.yml uses 'grep -q' instead of jq to parse config — inconsistent with scrape-user-data.yml which uses jq

sharedStateObservations.observation: backend-worker skill file is missing from .factory/skills/ — worker followed mission guidance directly without needing skill invocation
sharedStateObservations.suggestedAction: Consider documenting the expected backend-worker skill or ensuring skill files are present

sharedStateObservations.observation: services.yaml could document 'uv' as the project-standard Python package manager for scraper workflows
sharedStateObservations.suggestedAction: Add uv to services.yaml commands or library documentation
